titleStmt.title: SII 38.536: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 536. (A.R. No. 536 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the east and north wall, Nīrvaṇṇar shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Records that Tirunalluḻāṉ Tirunaṭṭapperumān Tiyāgamēgam, (a resident) of Maduraivāyil in Pēṟūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam made a gift of one thousand four hundred and sixty kuḻi of land in four different pieces, which he bought from the sabhaiyār of Kōvūr in Māṅgāṭṭu-nāḍu and enjoyed as his kāṇi, to the god, Nīrvaṇṇapperumāḷ, as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam commencing from the month of Māśi. Among the boundaries of the land mentioned, reference is made to a piece of land which this donor previously donated to this temple as tirunāmattikkāṇi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī vijayakaṇṭakopāla tevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 6vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puliyūr koṭṭamāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu peṉūrnāṭṭu
maturai vāyiṟt tirunalluḻāṉ tirunaṭṭapperumāṉ tiyākamekaṉeṉ Immaṇṭalattu Ikkoṭṭattu māṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭu kovūr capaiyār pakkal Eṉakku kāṇiyāka nāṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya tiruṉīrmalai nāyaṉār
nirvaṇṇapperumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam kovūr piṟinta Iraṇṭāṅ kaṭṭaḷaiyil teṉtuṇṭattil vaṭaviḷākattil paḻantirunāmattukkāṇi nilam Oru veliyum nikki Eṉ kāṇiyil Iṉṉāyaṉār nīrvaṇṇap
perumāḷukkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka nāṉviṭṭa cāṉakkālukku vaṭakkil turavuvalam pulam kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟu nāṟpatum Itaṉ teṉ kiḻakku Ikkāl cernta kuṇṭil
kuḻi nūṟṟeḻupatum Itaṉ vaṭakkut toppil teṟkaṭaiya kuḻi nūṟṟaimpatum Itaṉ teṉkiḻakku tiruttil teṉkūṟu kuḻi muṉṉūṟum Āka kuḻi Āyirattunāṉūṟṟuaṟupatum Ikkuḻi Āyirattu
nānūṟṟu Aṟupatum Ivvāṇṭai mācimātam mutal cantirātittavarai celvatāka viṭṭeṉ tirunallūḻāṉ tirunaṭṭapperumāṉ tiyākamekaṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 38.536 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
